Appearances:
Plaintiff United Properties Sales is present via its representative David Zigal.
Attorney Francois Xavier Sorba (650-570-0566) is present for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mario Lanao is present.
Attorney Stephanie Mella (415-933-7442) is present for defendant in limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Room 502B, re settlement discussions. The case is NOT settled. The trial date of JUN-30-2014 remains on calendar.
